description.en: Directory of Chinese hex nut manufacturers for wholesale buyers. Find ISO 9001 certified hex nut suppliers producing DIN 934.
description.zh: 面向批发买家的中国六角螺母制造商名录。寻找通过ISO 9001认证的六角螺母供应商，生产DIN 934、ANSI B18.2.2螺母大批量产品。

description.ar: دليل الشركات المصنعة للصواميل السداسية الصينية للمشترين بالجملة. ابحث عن موردين حاصلين على شهادة ISO 9001 ينتجون صواميل DIN 934، ANSI B18.2.2 بكميات كبيرة.

description.ru: Справочник китайских производителей шестигранных гаек для оптовых покупателей. Найдите поставщиков с сертификацией ISO 9001, производящих гайки DIN 934, ANSI B18.2.2 оптом.
description.ja: 中国六角ナットの卸売バイヤー向けmanufacturer一覧。DIN 934、ANSI B18.2.2ナッツを大量生産するISO 9001認定サプライヤーを探します。

description.hi: थोक खरीदारों के लिए चीनी हेक्स नट निर्माता। DIN 934, ANSI B18.2.2 नट के बड़े पैमाने पर उत्पादन करने वाले ISO 9001 प्रमाणित आपूर्तिकर्ताओं को खोजें।

keywords: China hex nut manufacturer, wholesale hex nuts, DIN 934 nuts, ANSI nuts, bulk nut supplier

heading.en: Types of Hex Nuts Available from China

body.en: Chinese manufacturers produce comprehensive hex nut ranges: 1. Hex Nuts DIN 934/ISO 4032: Standard hex nuts for general applications 2. Hex Flange Nuts DIN 6923: Flanged base for improved load distribution 3. Hex Jam Nuts DIN 439: Thin nuts for locking applications 4. Nylon Insert Lock Nuts DIN 985: Nylon insert prevents loosening 5. Castle Nuts DIN 935: Used with cotter pins for secured fastening 6. Heavy Hex Nuts DIN 934: Thicker for high-pressure applications 7. Structural Hex Nuts DIN 6915: For structural steel connections TradeGo manufactures all types with full traceability and quality documentation. Standard hex nut specifications: Size Range: M3 to M64 (metric) or #4 to 2-1/2" (imperial) Grades: - Grade 2 (low carbon): For light-duty applications - Grade 5 (medium carbon): For general construction - Grade 8 (medium carbon alloy): For high-strength applications - Grade 10 (alloy): For critical structural applications Materials: Carbon steel, alloy steel, stainless steel (304, 316, 316L) Coatings: Plain, zinc plated, hot-dip galvanized, dacromet, PTFE TradeGo hex nuts meet or exceed DIN 934/ISO 4032 and ANSI B18.2.2 standards. Standards-based procurement requires continuous learning as ISO, ASTM, DIN, and GB standards are revised every 3-5 years. Subscribe to standards update notifications and review specifications annually. The most common standards used in international fastener trade are ISO 898-1 (mechanical properties), ISO 3506-1 (stainless), ISO 3269 (acceptance inspection), ISO 4042 (coatings), and ISO 1502 (thread gauges). FOB Shanghai/Ningbo prices for standard hex nuts: Grade 4 Carbon Steel Zinc Plated: - M10: $1.80-2.50/kg - M12: $1.60-2.20/kg - M16: $1.40-1.90/kg - M20: $1.30-1.70/kg - M24: $1.20-1.50/kg Stainless Steel 304: - M10: $4.50-6.00/kg - M12: $4.00-5.50/kg - M16: $3.50-4.80/kg Prices decrease 15-25% at container quantities (20+ MT).
